title: Camden Town: 9:00 PM
content: Camden Town at night is a chaotic symphony of neon and grime. The air is thick with the scent of street food, damp pavement, and the distant thrum of bass from a hundred underground clubs. Tourists and outcasts collide on the narrow sidewalks, their faces flickering under the glow of cheap LED signs.||The canal water is black as ink, reflecting the distorted shadows of the markets. It's a place where secrets are bought and sold as easily as vintage records. Somewhere in this labyrinth, the man from the subway is waiting.||You have just enough time to make two moves before the trail goes cold.||⚠️ ACTION POINTS: 2

choices.text: Go to the address and meet the man.
Ask around Camden about Thomas Vane.
